_phase: TT.3 — Cost cap for Phase TT chunk runner
_note: Hard ceiling on automated decomposition spend. The ChunkRunner aborts when projected_cost_usd exceeds maxUsdPerDecomposition, OR when the per-step time hits maxSecondsPerStep. Hot-reloadable via refreshMchataisourceCache. Every wizard send tracks token usage via w1Metrics; the runner sums those before each step. If w1 is unavailable, falls back to maxStepsHard alone.

perArtifactOverrides._note: Per-artifact-type overrides. Most artifacts use the global default; macOSApp gets a higher per-step ceiling because Swift compilation + auto-fix consume more wall-time than HTML generation.

abortBehavior._note: What ChunkRunner does when a budget tripwire fires.
abortBehavior.onUsdExceeded: Stop after current step; emit user message 'Stopped after step N — cost cap $X reached. Use diagDecomposeNow with --maxUsd to retry with a higher cap.' Do NOT install partial work as the final artifact.
abortBehavior.onSecondsExceeded: Same as onUsdExceeded but cite the time-cap.
abortBehavior.onStepFailed: Skip remaining steps. Surface step-N's failure as the session result. Treat earlier successful steps as a partial-stair the user can resume from.
abortBehavior.ifNoBudgetData: Proceed with maxStepsHard alone. No usd/second tripwires fire.
